arts.ttl: Tottenham loan star on following Harry Kane's lead at Leyton Orient and dream Man City goal
arts.sum: Tottenham legend Harry Kane was Jamie Donley's boyhood idol growing up and now the talented young attacking midfielder is following in his footsteps by shining on loan at Leyton Orient

arts.ttl: Why is Ipswich vs Tottenham not on TV in UK? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have just claimed two consecutive Premier League wins and will now be hoping to exact revenge on Ipswich Town, but fans in the UK won't be able to watch the clash live on TV

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Tottenham's Premier League battle with Ipswich on Saturday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals how Djed Spence has turned his Tottenham career around - as full back is tipped for an England call-up
arts.sum: After returning to the fold in mid-December for the 5-0 victory over Southampton, Djed Spence has established himself as a mainstay of Agne Postecoglou's Tottenham side.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains why he deliberately made it difficult for Djed Spence and didn't pick him
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou admits that he "purposefully made it difficult" for Djed Spence earlier this season after deciding he wanted to keep the right-back at Tottenham and the 24-year-old came through the test with flying colours. Then last summer, with Tottenham assistant boss Matt Wells believed to have championed Spence's cause, Postecoglou agreed that something in the player had matured and he wanted to test that theory in the months ahead to ensure someone finally tapped into the undoubted potential Spence has, even if the Australian admits the full-back has surprised him by just how consistent his displays have been since he handed him his first start at the club.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou backs Tottenham’s Djed Spence for England call-up
arts.sum: Spence has emerged as a key player since he made his long-awaited first start for Spurs in December.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou tips Wilson Odobert for 'big impact' after £25m summer transfer
arts.sum: Spurs boss has placed an enormous amount of faith in the youngster despite an injury-hit debut campaign

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou sets challenge for 'laid back' Djed Spence as deliberate Spurs strategy pays off
arts.sum: The defender has had to wait a long time to kick-start his Spurs career

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on positive Cristian Romero scan update, Djed Spence and Bergvall
arts.sum: Yeah, look, I think, as I said, for us, it's been kind of – it's not just the guys coming back from injury, which are important, but they need time to sort of get up to speed. With the Europa League, there's no doubt it's been a difficult season, last week we saw protests outside, you've had injury after injury after injury, the results have suffered in the Premier League, the last two cup performances didn't go your way, but it feels like, with players coming back, there is still an opportunity to do something special this season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'request name change' in leaked email to Premier League broadcasters
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are often referred to as either 'Tottenham' or 'Spurs' but the Premier League club have written to broadcasters and informed them of what they wish to be called
